content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type and context: This is a pull request synchronize event for PR #238 "Regenerate pages and browser app" that auto-regenerates static assets after gene review changes. The PR has significant changes (516K additions, 1.4M deletions) across 100 files.

b. Request type: This is a code review request. The direct prompt asks me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
- Auto-generated PR that regenerates 1,321 gene review HTML pages and browser app
- Previous Claude reviews identified critical issue: empty app/data.js file 
- Accessibility issues with emoji-only vote buttons
- Console.log debug statements in production code
- Broken link in project page
- Multiple reviewers have flagged similar issues

d. Main tasks:
- Review the PR for code quality, bugs, performance, security issues
- Examine the critical app/data.js issue that's been consistently identified
- Check template issues (accessibility, debug code)
- Assess overall generation pipeline quality
- Provide comprehensive feedback

e. Plan:
- Read key files to understand the issue scope
- Examine app/data.js and related export functionality
- Review template files for identified issues
- Check a sample of generated HTML files
- Provide structured feedback on all requested areas
- Focus on the critical data export failure that renders the browser app non-functional

f. Limitations: I can provide comprehensive code review feedback but cannot fix issues unless explicitly asked to implement changes. I'll need to read the repository's CLAUDE.md for specific guidelines.
</analysis>

input.body: ### PR Review: Regenerate pages and browser app #### Review Checklist - [ ] Read repository guidelines and understand project structure - [ ] Examine the critical app/data.js issue identified in previous reviews - [ ] Review HTML generation quality and templates - [ ] Check for accessibility issues with vote buttons - [ ] Review console.log debug statements in production code - [ ] Check for security issues in generated content - [ ] Assess performance implications - [ ] Look for any validation issues - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback on all requested areas --- Starting comprehensive review of this auto-generated PR that updates static assets after gene review changes. [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/24496271957)
